=
FORGOTTEN DENTIST
=

[[File:FD Build.png|center|670x670px|link=]]
A Place Long Lost Forgotten, & Buried in Time.
{{Underline|442222}}{{Underline|664444}}{{Underline|aa8888}} =
Chapter I | The Discovery
= ==
September, 13th, 2024
== {{Underline|aa9999}}{{Underline|664444}}{{Underline|442222}}
"
“I still taste that sickening iron when I breathe, and I do not know if it is memory or the fear.

I was comfortably, and blindly walking through that place where the silence is reduced by the subtle rain outside and the warm enchants the peace. But, when '''it''' found me, the comfort… it was all gone. '''It''' introduced itself as a '''dentist'''. '''Its''' body was long and purely dark: not the darkness of shadow but the dark of something that had never let light cast upon. It grew clusters of teeth near on its body as if exposed to the influence of [[Odonpestis]]. Two arms grew from the middle of it, it looked stretched and wrong. '''Its''' face; God, '''its''' face; I cannot explain it. '''It''' looked like a man who had been scratched up and then melted back together, as if '''its''' every feature begging to be forgotten.

'''Its''' legs were ruined, snapped and grinding, clicking as it dragged itself forward. The sound came to me before the sight did. I ran. I swear that I ran with the best of everything that was mine; my breath, my strength, my hope; but it was faster. '''It''' caught me, and wrapped those arms around me.

'''''“Lie down. Stay calm,”''''' '''it''' said in a voice of an elderly yet calm and clear voice.

I did not understand why I listened, but my body obeyed as if calm were the only currency left in the situation.

Then '''its''' mouth split opened. '''It''' did not speak anymore. '''It''' vomited. Dental gears spilled out of it; metal, hooks, mirrors, which were things meant to peer and pry. '''It''' pressed them into my teeth. Then deeper. Into my jaw. Pain bloomed so violently I thought my skull would tear itself apart just to escape it. I screamed. I begged. I called for anyone. But the '''[[Backrooms Wiki|Backrooms]]''' are honest in one way only: no one comes.

I struck '''it''' with my fists, wild and useless, until one hit mattered. '''It''' sank into the carpet floor like wax exposed to fire, melting away, '''it''' took '''its''' tools.
That was my first time standing at the edge to death that it learned my name.”
[[File:FD drawing.png|center|670x670px|link=]]
- Arthur ████




{{Collapse|initial=
'''The story was unconfirmed, due to lack of evidence, and the ridiculousness of a hostile entity within such safe space. So, it had gone beneath the dust…'''
|final=
'''But, it was not so long after until another similar case was discovered…'''
|num=2|body=



==
October, 2nd, 2024
==
'''My name is Nathaniel. I lead a small group; small in number, but not in spirit. There’s Rayyan, George, Lily, and Alice. We look like strangers standing together, but survival has a power to stitching people into something that almost feels like family.''' '''Rayyan is multilingual, originally from Malaysia. He calls himself “John” now, he says it helps him blend in, and says it’s better that way. George was a farmer once. He had a family he loved deeply, until an unpredictable disaster took everything from him. He ended up here while running from that loss in despair. Lily is a teenage girl with Autism; she’s quiet but incredibly capable. Her father taught her how to make tools, and those lessons have kept us alive for more times than I can count. Alice was a single mother. Here… she lost her child. She doesn’t talk about it, but the silence says enough.''' '''I’m writing this as a warning. What we encountered was far worse than anything we had seen before.''' '''We were wandering through a wide, and beautiful field; lost, exhausted, and starving. We were barely holding on, but a single [[Object 1|bottle of almond water]] was enough to keep us going longer. When we finally sat to rest, that’s when we saw it.''' '''I will start by saying this: it did not act like it wanted to kill us. Not at first.''' '''It appeared without warning. It did not rise or drop in; it was just… suddenly there. Its body was long and unnaturally dark, like light refused to stay on its surface. Teeth were growing directly out of its flesh, not just in its mouth. Its face looked… damaged. Like someone had tried to erase a man by scraping and boiling him. The moment it entered our sight, we ran.''' '''It did not chase like an animal; it crawled fast and relentless, like it had been starving longer than we had. In three seconds it caught us. It ordered us to lie down and stay silent, the voice was calm and sounded strangely harmless. I don’t know why, but my body listened. Lily and Alice obeyed too. Rayyan; John; and George didn’t. They tried to run.''' '''It caught them effortlessly.''' '''I heard the sound before I could look. Like eggs cracking in a fist. And then I looked, they were gone.''' '''It returned to us and began inspecting our teeth, one by one like a dentist. It did not touched Alice entirely; her teeth were clean, which were shaped by years of a careful, and healthy diet. For Lily and me, it opened its mouth and spat out tools, which were rusty, and metallic things meant for dentists. It leaned close upon us, too close. It pushed and dug them into our teeth, then deeper, and then into our jaws. The pain was unbearable.''' '''Lily screamed.''' '''And that when it changed.''' '''The creature grew violent. It tore her mouth open, melted, and flowed into her mouth like a liquid of flesh. In seconds, she was gone; faded, erased, as if she had never been there at all.''' '''And then it stopped.''' '''The ground swallowed it. Alice and I were left alone, free and alive but shaking with terror. I don’t know why we survived and got spared. I don’t know why Lily didn’t. I know that it believed it was doing its job and I know that something like that is still out there; and if you ever see it, just pray it does not decide you need dental work.'''




{{Collapse|initial=
'''The stories sparked a light…'''
|final=
'''And major groups finally stepped in…'''
|num=3|body=



{{Underline|442222}}{{Underline|664444}}{{Underline|aa8888}} =
Chapter II | The Documentation And Investigation
= ==
October, 7th, 2024
== {{Underline|aa9999}}{{Underline|664444}}{{Underline|442222}}
'''Date:''' October, 7th, 2024
'''From: ██████ █████████'''
'''To: ████ ██████''' This message is to politely request the creation of a full documentation file regarding the recently identified entity encountered. A survivor, identified as "Arthur '''████'''," was recovered a month ago and provided a detailed witness account. It shows that the entity has a consistent attack pattern which involves verbal control, physical restraint, and targeted bodily mutilation. The encounter supposedly happened strangely within [[Level 4|Level 4]]. The survivor’s testimony is considered somewhat reliable at this time, although elements of the encounter is difficult to contextualize. In an addition, a note written with what seems to be a bold pencil was found from [[Level 10|Level 10]] somewhat 3 days after Arthur's account. The note is signed by a man named "Nathaniel," who's identity is currently unknown. The note describes an encounter with an entity matching Arthur ████’s description, which includes identical command behaviours, and method of attack. The similarity between both accounts shows repeated behavior rather than an ordinary incident. Right now, the entity should be considered extremely dangerous and capable of violence toward humans. Further interpretation of its behavior should be deferred until enough information has been collected. Please notify me once the documentation has been written.


{{Underline|664444}} {{Underline|aa8888}} {{Underline|664444}}
'''Date:''' October, 8th, 2024
'''From: ████ ██████'''
'''To: ██████ █████████''' The initial documentation file has been completed, partially, and archived under provisional classification. However, I must say that the lack of data has resulted in a short documentary, which seems wrong to be greenlit. Now, available material consists solely of two survivor-derived sources: the verified witness account of Arthur ████ and a handwritten statement attributed to Nathaniel █████. While both accounts demonstrate strong internal consistency, they are not enough to establish a definitive behavioral model or threat rationale. Several hypotheses are unresolved due to missing contextual information. With these limitations, I am formally requesting authorization to escalate this matter to the [[M.E.G.|M.E.G.]] for further investigation and research into the case. A coordinated documentary effort may provide additional encounter reports, biology, improved description, and possibly an image. Without external investigation, any conclusions drawn from the existing file will be speculative. Considering the entity’s apparent intelligence and lethality, continued uncertainty gives an unacceptable risk.


{{Underline|664444}} {{Underline|aa8888}} {{Underline|664444}}
'''Date:''' October, 8th, 2024
'''From: ██████ █████████'''
'''To:''' [[M.E.G.|Major Explorer Group (M.E.G.)]] This email is a polite request for [[M.E.G.|M.E.G.]] involvement in the investigation and documentation of a newly discovered presence of a hostile entity, designated as "Forgotten Face." The entity was encountered in [[Level 4|Level 4]] and [[Level 10|Level 10]] which has since been linked to multiple casualties. Current documentation is completely relied on limited information, which consists of one survivor witness account (Arthur ████) and a recovered handwritten note authored by a man named “Nathaniel.” Although both sources show strong consistence, the lack of inspectation and data has resulted in uncertainties. The location where we found the note and the survivor's encounter took place will be directed by Arthur ████. Forgotten Face has advanced cognition, calm voice usage, selective targeting, and extreme violence under specific scenarios. Its behavior do not fully align with common predatory entities, which complicates threat index and containment. Until further notice, the entity is classified as highly dangerous, and all interpretations are still provisional. Please let us know if you are able to proceed with this investigation and what coordination will be required.


{{Underline|664444}} {{Underline|aa8888}} {{Underline|664444}}
'''Date:''' October, 9th, 2024
'''From:''' [[M.E.G.|Major Explorer Group (M.E.G.)]]
'''To: ██████ █████████'''
We have reviewed your request and the preliminary materials provided regarding the entity provisionally designated "Forgotten Face." Based on the consistency between the survivor account of Arthur ████ and the recovered written statement attributed to Nathaniel, the entity is depicted as credible and potentially an ongoing threat. The behavioral elements described; calm verbal command usage, selective, and rapid; warrant further scrutiny, though available data is still insufficient for definitive classification. Tgis investigation and research party will be conducted as resources permit. At this stage, containment or direct contact is not planned unless deemed necessary. Any findings will be given for archival integration upon completion. You will be notified after the deployment. Further requests should be held until initial results are returned.




{{Collapse|initial=
'''The [[M.E.G.]] replied with strong and an interested voice…'''
|final=
'''The research began shortly after Arthur was transported…'''
|num=4|body=

== {{Underline|aa9999}}{{Underline|664444}}{{Underline|442222}}

We’ve been in the zone Arthur led us to for a short while now. Almost immediately, we started finding signs of the entity. Scratches along the lower walls, they are deep, like something was dragged along instead of walking. There’s also a trail of dark stains; thick, and uneven; leading straight into a solid wall. '''Recording Time: [14.9s]'''
There’s no visible opening. The trail just… stops. Following it further isn’t possible. '''Recording Time: [17.3s]'''
We collected samples of the black substance instead. Took precautions; sealed containers, no direct contact; and sent them back to base for biological analysis. Initial observations say it is not oil or decay, but we will wait for confirmation. '''Recording Time: [21.8s]'''
Once the results come back, they’ll be added to the database for further reference. '''Recording Time: [25.6s]'''

We’re currently moving across [[Level 10|Level 10]]. Things are clear. Terrain is normal; open field, and tall grass or some kind of crops covering it. A member of our unit, ███████ ████, guided us here. This is supposedly where Nathaniel’s handwritten note was reportedly recovered. Yeah, ███████ is really smart for remembering the location. '''Recording Time: [13.6s]'''
Ok, we've arrived and we are seeing it again. Black stains across the field, same as before. They are spread unevenly, like something crawled and did not care where it went. '''Recording Time: [18.9s]'''
The trail leads to a small puddle ahead. Stagnant, dark red, and smells… really wrong. The surrounding grass or wheat is pressed down, which means a victim was pursued here. And this confirms the entity’s past presence and in this area. '''Recording Time: [23.7s]'''
We’re going to take samples like before. Black substance first with same precautions as last time. A secondary sample from the blood puddle to determine if it is organic, fake, or anomalous. No direct contact. '''Recording Time: [31.4s]'''
Samples will be transferred to base for confirmation. If the blood’s real… that proves things further. '''Recording Time: [36.2s]'''
The area is being marked. We are pulling back for now. '''Recording Time: [39.0s]'''
Ok, end audio log. ---- '''> Audio Recording Ends''' ---- Attached Image: '''File:ERROR''' ----

This isn’t— this isn’t right— ... '''Recording Time: [ERROR]'''
Why is this thing still not— ... ... '''> Audio Recording Successfully Recovered''' '''Recording Time: [0.4s]'''
Sh██! Oh, O-okay… okay… recording’s finally live. '''Recording Time: [3.6s]'''
This is audio Log 3. [[M.E.G.|M.E.G.]] Operative ████. '''Recording Time: [7.9s]'''
We’re inside the base. Research wing. I— I just arrived after the alert. '''Recording Time: [12.8s]'''
There are two bodies on the floor. Scientists. Both of them. Their— their mouths are… torn out. They don't seem to be cut or bitten clean; it looks like something pushed into their mouths. '''Recording Time: [18.6s]'''
There’s blood everywhere. On the walls. On the desks. I—I can’t tell how long they’ve been dead. '''Recording Time: [23.4s]'''
One more is missing, ████████; he’s not here. He was supposed to be with them. He’s… he has been my coworker for years. We weren’t the closet, but— he did not deserve this. '''Recording Time: [28.9s]'''
Other personnel beside the base said they heard everything. The screaming… and, metal scraping. They said they ran. They did not dare to look back. '''Recording Time: [34.7s]'''
One of them, only one, said he saw something in the corner of his eye. A shape, on the ground, moving. He thought it was just a hallucination, and did not report it. ... ... ... '''Recording Time: [40.8s]'''
I don’t think it was. '''Recording Time: [44.6s]'''
I think the entity followed us back with the markings we left behind. We gave it a path blindly. '''Recording Time: [49.9s]'''
But I do not know how it got out. There’s no sight of it; it’s just… gone. '''Recording Time: [55.3s]'''
And if it left sliently… it might still be nearby. Do not follow markings without clearance. ... '''Recording Time: [1:03.7]'''
End audio log… ---- '''> Audio Recording Ends''' ---- Attached Image: [[File:FD death.png|link=|200x200px]] ----

{{Underline|664444}} {{Underline|aa8888}} {{Underline|664444}}
'''Date:''' October, 21th, 2024
'''From:''' [[M.E.G.|Major Explorer Group (M.E.G.)]]
'''To: ██████ █████████'''
This message is as a formal response to the database request for more updated information on the entity currently documented under the provisional designation "Forgotten Face." Review of traces of the entity, field logs, and a recent internal incident cpnfirms "Forgotten Face" as an active and hostile entity. Confirmed victims have severe facial trauma, with consistent damage to the mouth area. Encounters are frequently associated with a black substance connected to the entity’s movement. Samples have been recovered and are under analysis. Blood collected at multiple sites has been confirmed as biological in origin. Recent incident shows the entity is a intelligent and may track markings left behind by personnel. This entry should still be subject to revision as new information becomes available.

{{Underline|442222}}{{Underline|664444}}{{Underline|aa9999}} ==
November, 3rd, 2024
== {{Underline|aa9999}}{{Underline|664444}}{{Underline|442222}}
=
'''Entity X - ''"Forgotten Face"'''''
= ==
'''I / Description'''
== {{Blurimage|file=FD drawing.png|caption=A crudely drawn sketch by Arthur ████, depicting the raw appearance of '''Forgotten Face'''.|align=right}} '''Forgotten Face''' is a hostile, and humanoid entity seen commonly in safe places where normal entities cannot exist. The entity features a tall, and bold body of pure dark coloration. Two long arms are positioned unnaturally at the midpoint of its torso. Its lower body appears severely damaged or nonfunctional. The entity does not walk; instead, moves by dragging itself. The entity’s facial structure is described as grotesque and distorted, which resembles severe physical trauma. Witnesses report the face appears scraped, burned, or partially melted that makes an unidentifiable face. During movement, the entity creates snapping or clicking sounds, believed to originate from damaged limbs or internal structures. ==
'''II / Behaviour'''
== '''Forgotten Face''' behaves with human-like cognition and does not behave like a typical predatory entity. Survivors report that it commands or enforces compliance before proceeding an attack. Individuals who obey its instructions have, in some cases, survived than the individuals who attempted to flee. The entity appears to select certain individuals rather than groups. Discovered attacks involve severe trauma to the face; specifically the mouth and jaw. Victims are found with these areas destroyed or missing entirely. The entity has additionally been seen somehow creating dental tools or mechanical objects from within its body. Saved recordings reveal '''Forgotten Face''' may be capable of tracking trails, markings, or renmants left behind by a lost individuals or a personnel. ==
'''III / Biology'''
== Encounters with this entity usually left behind a anomalous black substance found on surfaces or trails. Samples recovered by the [[M.E.G.]] have not yet been fully identified and do not match oil, dust, or any other known biological fluids. Additionally, blood recovered at multiple encounter sites has been confirmed as biological in origin, and supported survivors witness accounts of physical harm from the entity ==
'''IV / Discovery'''
== ''''Forgotten Face''' was first noticed after the witness of a survivor, Arthur ████, from an unknown indoor level and later confirmed as [[Level 4]]. His account described an unknown hostile entity and was initially treated as an isolated incident. A month later, expedition personnel discovered a handwritten note while in [[Level 10]], and the note seemed to be authored by Nathaniel █████. The note described an encounter that perfectly aligns with Arthur ████’s account. The obvious consistency between both reports made a brief investigation party by the [[M.E.G.]]. Biological samples; the black substance and blood residue, were found and confirmed as genuine. Based on overlapping accounts and physical evidence, the entity was formally designated as '''Forgotten Face'''.




{{Collapse|initial=
'''It felt like they had learned everything about the entity and know how to protect themselves…'''
|final=
'''But a month later, things did not go right…'''
|num=6|body=



{{Underline|442222}}{{Underline|664444}}{{Underline|aa8888}} =
Chapter III | Halls of The Dead
= ==
December, 6th, 2024
== {{Underline|aa9999}}{{Underline|664444}}{{Underline|442222}}

[[File:Today!!!.png|center|200x200px]]
𝔅𝔞𝔠𝔨𝔯𝔬𝔬𝔪𝔰 𝔗𝔬𝔡𝔞𝔶


{{Underline|fff}}
The Forgotten Face Massacre
{{Underline|fff}} On December 6, 2024, the [[Backroom Colonists]]’ '''Expressway Base''' on [[Level 154]] suffered a major security breach which resulted from an attack by the newly documented entity known as '''Forgotten Face'''. The incident caused extensive structural damage and loss of human lifes. Casualties are estimated at 266 confirmed fatalities, with an additional 100 individuals injured, several critically. The entity entered the base with almost no detection and crawled through occupied areas before alarms rang. Victims were put through severe facial trauma, with reports saying the brutal insertion of metallic itmes into the mouth until death occurred. Once the alert activated, [[Backroom Colonists]] military personnel fought the entity. With enough resistance, '''Forgotten Face''' backed up by phasing through a wall and was no longer observable. The method of entry and exit is currently unknown. [[File:FD Dead.png|center|300x300px|link=]]







He was neither part of the responsive team, nor trained to fight entities or to protect. His assignment came after what was frightening. It was when the alarms were quiet and the base was declared ''“secure enough.”'' He was just there to clean the leftovers.

The corridors of the Expressway no longer looked like a somewhat ruined yet livable place people still tried to stay. The lights became darker, subtly illuminating the long streaks of black substances and darker stains caused by the entity.

Every steps he took, the floor stuck lightly to his boots. Then, his mop caught on something hard: small gears, and tool fragments.

The worst part was the lifeless bodies. He had to carried them away from human habitations and buried them underneath the debris, while the rotten stench blocked his nose from breathing. The walls were smeared with black stains at the height of his head. He swept until his arms ached with fatigue. Because, he knew he could erase what had happened there.

Later, the body bags were fully removed, but the shadows stayed. In one corridor, he stopped working for several minutes, staring at a long scrape that vanished into solid concrete. He tried to imagine how something could leave that mark and then simply went into the wall. He failed, and the failure left him shaken.

Other cleaners worked quietly, without any eye contact. No one talked about the mouths. No one talked about the gears. They obeyed their assignments, marked areas as “cleared,” and moved on.

Every so usually, someone would pause and listen, expecting the sound of snapping limbs or wet movement behind the walls. By the end of the shift, he felt hollow. Not traumatized in a dramatically; instead, just emptied. He washed his hands again and again, even after the water ran clear.

Hours later, when he tried to sleep, he found himself keeping his jaw hidden, cautious of showing his mouth in the dark.

He knew '''Forgotten Face''' would come back. It felt like it tested the base, testing if it is weak enough. Some day, some where, somehow:
It will return







{{BacknetPost/CSS}}
{{BacknetPost |author=DaveJ2013 |message=Earlier today, I was assigned to assist with cleanup operations after the Expressway massacre on [[Level 154|Level 154]], which was caused by an attack from the newly discovered entity known as '''Forgotten Face'''. I knew it wouldn’t be comfortable, but I had to.
The area was covered in black stains, scratches, and blood, far more than I expected, and the hardest part by far was carrying the bodies. We had to carry them over long distances, and the smell… ugh, the smell had set in, and made it impossible not to think about how sudden and brutal it all was.
I finished the shift exhausted, more mentally than physically, and all I can really do now is hope that the people who survived are managing to get through it. |replies={{BacknetPost|message=Dude, that's terrible!|category=}} {{BacknetPost|message=I feel bad… I wanna do a charity to support those who need medical treatments. Can you tell me where it is?|author={{USERNAME}}|category=|replies={{BacknetPost|message=In [[Level 154|Level 154]], [[Backrooms Colonists|Backrooms Colonists]]' base: Expressway. I would recommend asking other bases the direction. Good luck travelling!|author=DaveJ2013}}}} }}




{{Collapse|initial=
'''The attack seemed like it was the beginning, and the entity might come back…'''
|final=
'''But, the [[Backrooms Colonists]] knew this shortly after, and are now prepared…'''
|num=7|body=



{{Underline|442222}}{{Underline|664444}}{{Underline|aa8888}} =
Chapter IV | Confrontation...?
= ==
December, 16th, 2024
== {{Underline|aa9999}}{{Underline|664444}}{{Underline|442222}}
After the massacre, the base did not feel alive anymore; it merely persisted. People still traded supplies, shared meals, and still managed to sleep. But, everything was done with a thin, and fragile patience; a glass held together by tapes. Conversations stopped when they passed the Expressway.

They armed themselves out of fear, not confidence. With [[Object 29|Kalthoff Rifles]], rocks with spiky edges, and sharpened tools repurposed into weapons. Even those who had never held a gun before learned where to place their fingers, and learned how to breathe before pulling a trigger. No one joked anymore.

Two weeks passed like that. Two weeks of waiting, of listening to the walls until they might whisper warnings. Then, one day, the black stains returned.

They crept across the concrete, thin first, but then pooling with purpose. Someone screamed. Someone else fired too early. By the time '''Forgotten Face''' emerged, dragged itself into the open, the entire base was awake and armed.

Weapons were raised. Fingers tightened. The air tasted of dread and rotten patience.

The entity halted.

'''It''' neither recoil, nor proceed. '''Its''' ruined body trembled, with '''Its''' arms hanging midair; uncertain of what posture to take. The snapping sounds slowed. '''Its''' face; if it could still be called that; tilted slightly, as if '''It''' was trying to study the scene with a broken sense.

''“If you want to destroy our community,”'' one man shouted, his voice cracked but loud enough to push through the tension, ''“try us first!”''

The words ran loud. For a moment, nothing answered.

Then the entity moved its mouth.

''''''“D—destroy?”''''' it said.

The voice was wrong… not monstrous, nor commanding; fractured, and sounded broken. Like a calm speech forced through rusted spikes.

'''''“I’ve came to fix things again…”'''''

The guns wavered. Murmurs spread, disbelievingly and furious all at once.

''“You didn’t fix anything!”'' someone yelled. ''“You made things worse!”''

The entity shivered. '''Its''' arms came closer to its torso. When it spoke again, the sound trembled. stretched thin by something almost like panic.

'''''“But… I’m a dentist,”'' it''' said. '''''“Am I not a… dentist?”'''''

Yet again: no one answered.

The silence afterward was immense; denser than smoke, and heavier than grief. It pressed against everyone's chest. Somewhere, a weapon fell on the floor.

The entity’s gaze moved from face to face. '''It''' lingered on mouths; closed tight, bloodless, and afraid.

'''''“I… I remember helping,”''''' it muttered. '''''“They used to thank me. I— I'm Dr. Oliver… Oliver Bennett! You know, right? Right…?”'''''

Some people's long forgotten memory suddenly rushed back in. Tears flooded their eyes. A woman in the back could not hold it; she remembered how '''Oliver''' was a kind dentist and how he, '''it''', used to give her toys.

The entity stepped back; still confused, and distressed. '''It''' held '''its''' mouth. Then, few metal tools spilled briefly from its mouth and clattered harmlessly at '''its''' feet.

'''''“I don’t understand,”''''' it said, but quieter. '''''“Everything hurts. Everything is wrong. I see broken things everywhere. And I was taught to fix what hurts and what broke.”'''''

Someone lowered their gun. Then dropped.

Then another.

All of the ones who remembered lost grasp of their weapons.

No one stepped forward. No one stepped back. The base stood frozen between rage and realization, between the memory of what had been lost and the unbearable possibility that the '''man''' before them did not know what '''he''' had become.

'''Forgotten Face''', or '''Oliver''', looked around one last time. Slowly awkwardly, '''he''' stepped away. Melted once more into the ground; not flight, not fight, but retreating like something ashamed.

The trails of stain '''he''' left behind were thinner this time.

And long afterwards, the people sat down where they stood; still breathing, and wondering whether they had faced a mindless monster, or the broken self of a '''man''' who ceased to know how to fix things the only way '''he''' remembered.

And after that day, '''he''' was never seen again… It feels like '''he''' became aware of '''his''' present self, therefore, '''he''' hides away in where humans are absent; worrying he would cause a problem instead of "fixing."

To this day, it is theorised that '''Oliver''' still lives with a broken mind. And the fact that '''he''' used to be a kind dentist…

'''He is indeed,
a Forgotten Dentist'''…
